title: rubus retrogressus
intro: Rubus retrogressus, also known as the Alpine Bramble or Dwarf Raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus retrogressus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
